# Aleksa Spasic


AI SaaS Founder & Creator — Grew ViralityAI.net to 185K users

or



collaborations@alexxmarketing.com












### ViralityAI.net


Grew an AI SaaS platform to over 185,000 users through strategic content creation and viral growth techniques.









### 185K+ Users


Built a massive community of creators and entrepreneurs who leverage AI tools for viral content and business growth.









### Collaborations


Open to brand partnerships, speaking engagements, and collaborations. Reach out at collaborations@alexxmarketing.com.

## Initiate



Welcome to the digital home of Aleksa Spasic — AI SaaS Founder & Creator. I built ViralityAI.net and grew it to over 185,000 users, helping creators and businesses harness the power of artificial intelligence to scale their content and reach. This platform is where I share insights, tools, and strategies at the intersection of AI, growth marketing, and product building.


Whether you're looking to automate your workflows, understand viral growth mechanics, or explore the latest in AI-driven content creation, you've come to the right place. Let's build the future together.



Get In Touch















AI SaaS Founder & Creator. Grew ViralityAI.net to 185K users. Building modern tools for creators.

## About Aleksa Spasic

Aleksa Spasic is an AI SaaS Founder & Creator who grew ViralityAI.net to over 185K users. He builds cutting-edge AI tools that help creators and businesses scale their online presence, leveraging deep expertise in artificial intelligence and digital marketing.

With a passion for innovation and a track record of delivering results, Aleksa continues to push the boundaries of what's possible with AI-driven growth strategies. His work has empowered thousands of users worldwide, making advanced AI accessible and actionable.
Get in Touch





About

## Your Data, Your Power: Our Privacy Promise — Aleksa Spasic

URL: https://aleksa-spasic-0ffc9fef.zappy5.app/privacy/policy
Description: Understand how Aleksa Spasic&#39;s platform protects your info with transparent, user-first privacy practices. Your trust fuels our AI community—read the full policy.

Your Data, Your Power: Our Privacy Promise — Aleksa Spasic

All Courses













Privacy Center


# Privacy Policy








- What is the Privacy Policy and what does it cover?

- What information do we collect?

- How do we use your information?

- How is your information shared on Meta Courses or with integrated partners?

- How do we share information with third parties?

- How do the Meta Companies work together?

- How can you manage or delete your information and exercise your rights?

- How long do we keep your information?

- How do we transfer information?

- How do we respond to legal requests, comply with applicable law and prevent harm?

- How will you know the Policy has changed?

- Privacy notice for United States residents

- How to contact Meta with questions









## What is the Privacy Policy and what does it cover?








Seeing if our Courses are working correctly, such as troubleshooting, and fixing it when it's not working










Personalizing features, content and recommendations, such as your Facebook Feed, Instagram Feed, AI at Meta, Stories and ads.










To promote safety, security and integrity and comply with applicable laws










To personalize offers, ads and other sponsored or commercial content










To develop, provide and personalize features and integrations










To understand how people use and interact with Meta Company Courses










## How long do we keep your information?








If we need it to operate or provide our Courses. For example, we need to keep some of your information to maintain your account. Learn more.










The feature we use it for, and how that feature works. For example, messages sent using Messenger's vanish mode are retained for less time than regular messages. Learn more.










How long we need to retain the information to comply with certain legal obligations. See some examples.










In accordance with applicable law










To promote the safety, security and integrity of Meta Courses, users, employees, property and the public. Learn more.










## How do we use your information?








Personalize features and content (such as your Facebook Feed, Instagram Feed, AI at Meta and Stories);










Personalize the ads people see, and










Make suggestions for you (such as people you may know, groups or events that you may be interested in or topics that you may want to follow) on and off our Courses.










## What information do we collect?








Content you create, like posts, comments or audio










Content you provide through our camera feature or your camera roll settings, or through our voice-enabled features










Metadata about content










Interactions with AI at Meta and related metadata. For example, information you or others exchange with AI at Meta like content and messages










Types of content you view or interact with, and how you interact with it










Apps and features you use, and what actions you take in them














































AI SaaS Founder & Creator. Grew ViralityAI.net to 185K users. Building modern tools for creators.

TERMS AND POLICIES

Terms you agree to when you use Facebook.













### Privacy Policy



Information we receive and how it's used.













### Community Standards



What's not allowed and how to report abuse.

- Payment Policies

- Platform Resources

- Jobs, Events, and Live

## Better business performance, fueled by AI


From personalization that increases engagement to creative ad generation, AI from Meta can help you reach people along every stage of the buying journey and maximize your ROI.


Get started with Meta ads




Learn more









Reach



Engagement




aleksa.spasic
Ad

Shop now
















## Chat with Meta AI business assistant


Get instant answers to help improve your campaign performance, resolve account issues and more.




Learn more













## Your customers are here — and Meta technologies are where they discover, purchase and stay connected.


Grow your business with AI that anticipates people's needs to drive results at any stage.













Discovery
Evaluation
Purchase
Post-Purchase













## 59% discover new products and brands on Meta technologies1


More people find new brands and products on Meta than any other platform.













## 53% say Meta technologies drove evaluation1


Meta helps people research and compare before they buy — outpacing every other channel.













## Nearly half of consumers use Meta to help complete a purchase1


Nearly half of consumers use Meta to help complete a purchase.













## Meta is #1 for post-purchase brand loyalty and connection1


Meta is #1 for post-purchase brand loyalty and connection.














## Unlock more growth, faster with AI-enabled advertising tools from Meta.



It's now easier to use AI to automate your business growth. From generating images to optimizing creative for the right audiences, let our suite of AI-enabled tools do the heavy lifting for you — while you boost sales and performance.



Learn more















## Meta Advantage+


Discover how to unlock next-level campaign performance with our suite of AI-enabled tools. Advantage+ can help you optimize creative, reach the right audiences and much more.





Advantage+ sales campaigns






Drive online sales efficiently with Advantage+ sales campaigns. Our most advanced AI marketing tool optimizes your creative, targeting, placements and budget automatically.





Learn more









Advantage+ creative






Instantly create ads that are personalized and optimized for your customers. Available right in Ads Manager, our easy-to-use creative solutions help you diversify and uplevel your ads to drive better performance.





Learn more














Advantage+



Shop now



















## You’re one question away from better campaign results.


Want better results? Easy. Ask Meta AI business assistant. Get tailored campaign recommendations, performance insights and account support — right from your Meta ad account.

Learn more
















Sales


Shop now












## Turn attention into action with Reels ads.







We're building more ways to help you deliver more relevant experiences that perform, including:


- Reels trending ads: Place ads next to the most popular content on our apps.

- Post-roll ads in Instagram Reels: Autoplay your ad after or in between reels views.

- Flexible grid for Advantage+ catalog ads in Reels: Create more immersive catalog ads.










## Unlock creator content to reach more customers and boost results.







There are more ways than ever to build partnerships and drive sales with creators.


- Partnership Ads Hub: Find the right organic creator content for your business.

- Creator marketplace: Discover creators aligned with your customers.

- User-generated style video: Use AI to make compelling creator-style videos from scratch.










## Turn organic content into a shoppable experience.







Now every piece of organic content can become a potential shopping opportunity.


- Shop similar feature on Facebook and Instagram: Use AI-fueled visual discovery to let people find and purchase products they see in videos and images.
















AI SaaS Founder & Creator




ViralityAI.net — 185K Users



Brand Collaborations & Growth










## Get the latest updates from Meta for Business.


Provide your email address to receive the latest updates from Meta for Business, including news, events and product updates.









By submitting this form, you agree to receive marketing related electronic communications from Meta, including news, events, updates and promotional emails. You may withdraw your consent and unsubscribe from these at any time, for example, by clicking the unsubscribe link included on our emails. For more information about how Meta handles your data please read our Data Policy.

## Adjust how content on Facebook is shown to you based on your activity from other businesses






**Q: What is this setting and how does it work?**



This setting controls whether Facebook uses information about your activity from other businesses and organizations to personalize your ads and content experience. When enabled, Facebook may show you ads and content that are more relevant based on your interactions with other websites, apps, and services that use Facebook's business tools.







**Q: Where can I find this setting on Facebook?**



You can find this setting by navigating to Settings & Privacy > Settings > Your Facebook Information > Off-Facebook Activity. From there, you can review which businesses have shared your activity and manage your preferences for how this data is used to personalize your experience on Facebook.







**Q: What happens if I turn this setting off?**



If you turn this setting off, Facebook will stop using your activity from other businesses and organizations to personalize your ads and content. You will still see the same number of ads, but they may be less relevant to your interests. Your past activity data will be disconnected from your account but not deleted.







**Q: How can I manage which businesses share my activity?**



You can manage individual businesses by visiting the Off-Facebook Activity section in your settings. There you'll see a list of businesses that have shared your activity with Facebook. You can disconnect specific businesses, clear your history, or download your information for review. You can also use the Clear History tool to disconnect all past activity at once.







**Q: Does this setting affect my privacy on other platforms?**



No, this setting only affects how Facebook uses your off-platform activity data. It does not change how other platforms or businesses collect or use your data. Each platform has its own privacy settings that you should review separately. Facebook's setting only controls the personalization of your experience within Facebook's products.











## Adjust how content on Facebook is shown to you based on your activity from other businesses


If you're in the European Region or the United Kingdom, your ad choices are different. Learn more about your ad choices.



- 1 Click your profile picture in the top right of Facebook.

- 2 Select Settings & privacy, then click Settings.

- 3 Click Accounts Center, then click Your information and permissions.

- 4 Click Activity from other businesses.

- 5 Choose whether we can show you ads based on your activity from other businesses.

# Privacy Center



- Privacy Center home

## Cookies Policy


What are cookies, and what does this policy cover?


Effective December 12, 2023 | View printable version | See previous versions





Cookies are small pieces of text used to store information on web browsers. Cookies are used to store and receive identifiers and other information on computers, phones and other devices. Other technologies, including data that we store on your web browser or device, identifiers associated with your device and other software, are used for similar purposes. In this policy, we refer to all of these technologies as “cookies.”


We use cookies if you have a Facebook or Instagram account, use the Meta Courses, including our website and apps, or visit other websites and apps that use the Meta Courses (including the Like button). Cookies enable Meta to offer the Meta Courses to you and to understand the information that we receive about you, including information about your use of other websites and apps, whether or not you are registered or logged in.


This policy explains how we use cookies and the choices you have. Except as otherwise stated in this policy, the Privacy Policy will apply to our processing of the data that we collect via cookies.






### Why do we use cookies?


Cookies help us provide, protect and improve the Meta Courses, such as by personalising content, tailoring and measuring ads, and providing a safer experience. The cookies that we use include session cookies, which are deleted when you close your browser, and persistent cookies, which stay in your browser until they expire or you delete them. The cookies we use may change over time as we improve and update Meta Courses, we typically use them for the following purposes:




Authentication





Security, site and product integrity





Advertising, recommendations, insights and measurement





Site features and services





Performance





Analytics and research





Third-party websites and apps






### Where do we use cookies?


We may place cookies on your computer or device and receive information stored in cookies when you use or visit:


- The Meta Courses;

- Courses provided by other members of the Meta Companies; and

# Return Policy


Last Updated: 7/16/2026



At Aleksa Spasic, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: collaborations@alexxmarketing.com


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  7/16/2026



Aleksa Spasic ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Aleksa Spasic

- Email: collaborations@alexxmarketing.com

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

- Courses All Courses

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  July 16, 2026



Aleksa Spasic is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Aleksa Spasic

- Email: collaborations@alexxmarketing.com

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  July 16, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Aleksa Spasic

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Personal Brand / Influencer provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Aleksa Spasic provides Personal Brand / Influencer through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Aleksa Spasic. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Aleksa Spasic

- Email: collaborations@alexxmarketing.com

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
